Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
S
Sarah M.

Refined Exteriors did an outstanding job on our new vinyl siding! The team was professional, efficient, and the quality of work was top-notch. Our house looks amazing, and we've already noticed a difference in our energy bills. Highly recommend!

J
John K.

We had Refined Exteriors replace our old wood siding with fiber cement, and we're very pleased with the results. The crew was skilled and meticulous, and they cleaned up thoroughly after the job. There was a slight delay due to weather, but they kept us informed throughout the process.

E
Emily L.

After a nasty hail storm, our siding was riddled with dents. Refined Exteriors came out quickly and repaired the damage seamlessly. You can't even tell there was ever any damage! Great service and fair pricing.

D
David B.

Refined Exteriors installed beautiful cedar siding on our historic home in Capitol Hill. They took great care to preserve the architectural details and the result is stunning. Worth every penny!

Additional Siding Installer Services

Refined Exteriors — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every siding installer project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Refined Exteriors Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific siding installer needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Denver & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Denver, CO and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Aurora Lakewood Arvada Littleton Highlands Ranch Centennial Broomfield Westminster
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our siding installer services.

How long does vinyl siding installation take?

The duration depends on the size and complexity of your home, but most installations are completed within 3-7 days.

Is vinyl siding energy efficient?

Yes, vinyl siding can improve your home's energy efficiency by providing an extra layer of insulation. We also offer insulated vinyl siding for even greater energy savings.

What type of warranty do you offer?

We offer a comprehensive warranty on both materials and workmanship, giving you peace of mind.

Built on Denver Values

Get a free, no-obligation siding consultation and estimate. Call now to schedule!

Let's Begin →
